author: zoy
description: Turn a note into a 9:16 vertical short video. A cloud LLM (OpenAI/DeepSeek) rewrites it into a script; local Kokoro TTS and ffmpeg render it with auto images, captions and music. Your note text is sent to the cloud LLM. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: zoyluo
manifest.description: Turn a note into a 9:16 vertical short video. A cloud LLM (OpenAI/DeepSeek) rewrites it into a script; local Kokoro TTS and ffmpeg render it with auto images, captions and music. Your note text is sent to the cloud LLM.
manifest.name: ZoyClip - Note to Short Video

name: ZoyClip - Note to Short Video

releases.author: zoyluoblue
releases.description: Fixes for the Obsidian community review (obsidianmd eslint): use getLanguage(), move inline styles to a CSS class, use activeDocument, and raise minAppVersion to 1.8.7. No user-facing feature changes.

releases.author: zoyluoblue
releases.description:
First community-store release.

Bilingual (English / 中文) — turn a note into a 9:16 vertical short video: cloud LLM script (OpenAI/DeepSeek), local Kokoro TTS, auto Pexels images, animated captions, background music, and an auto cover. Local-first; see the README 'Privacy & network use' section for what is sent over the network.

releases.author: zoyluoblue
releases.description: 首个可直接下载的构建。安装：下载下面三个文件，放进你 Obsidian vault 的 `.obsidian/plugins/zoyclip/` 文件夹，启用插件即可。详见 README。
releases.name: ZoyClip 0.0.1 — Obsidian 笔记→竖屏短视频
